creator: freebsd@jdc.parodius.com
text:
The rc.d startup scripts mdconfig and mdconfig2 lack example
	usage/definitions in /etc/defaults/rc.conf.  The rc.conf(5)
	man page does document the variables, but it would be nice if
	their existence was mentioned in /etc/defaults/rc.conf.  The
	examples should, obviously, be commented out.

Fix: 

Add relevant commented-out entries.
How-To-Repeat: 	grep mdconfig /etc/defaults/rc.conf
